#弅喃木剉﹛﹛??﹛巟鼹
#
#﹛﹛﹛凌607978及摒

###﹛凌607978午凌607988毛赭当

block Item_607978 >= 1 && Item_607988 >= 1

	KillItem 607978,1,(3004861)
	KillItem 607988,1,(3004862)
	GiveItem(607680%15,607685%10,608600%10,608603%10,607992%15,607715%15,631056%5,631057%10,631058%10),(3004863)



###﹛宁丹坁互卅中

block

	SystemMessage 3004868
